zh.Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais,: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourg於1169年出生在比利時時，他的父親Baudouin IV de Hainaut61歲，母親Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut53歲。他和Maria van Peteghem至少有2個兒子。他去世於1220年1月22日之後。

zh-hans.Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais,: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourg于1169年出生在比利时时，他的父亲Baudouin IV de Hainaut61岁，母亲Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut53岁。他和Maria van Peteghem至少有2个儿子。他去世于1220年1月22日之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourg was born in 1169, in Belgium, his father, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, was 61 and his mother, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, was 53. He had at least 2 sons with Maria van Peteghem. He died after 22 January 1220.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourg est né en 1169, à Belgique, son père, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, avait 53 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Maria van Peteghem. Il est décédé après 22 janvier 1220.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourg 1169 in Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin IV de Hainaut 61 und seine Mutter Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut 53. Er hatte mit Maria van Peteghem mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb nach 22. Januar 1220.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourg è nato il nel 1169 nel Belgio, il suo padre, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, aveva 61 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, aveva 53 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Maria van Peteghem. Morì dopo il 22 gennaio 1220.

ja.Mons, Hainaut, Belgium: ベルギーヘイナトモンス
ja.Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais,: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードベレンシエンス
ja.lifeSummary: Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourgが1169年にベルギーで生まれた時，父Baudouin IV de Hainautは61歳，母Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainautは53歳であった。彼はMaria van Peteghemとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1220年1月22日以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourg(이)가 1169년 벨기에에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin IV de Hainaut(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut(은)는 53세였다. 그는 Maria van Peteghem(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1220년 1월 22일 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourg nasceu em 1169, em Bélgica, seu pai, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, tinha 53 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Maria van Peteghem. Ele faleceu após 22 de janeiro de 1220.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourg родился в 1169 г. в местности Бельгия, его отцу по имени Baudouin IV de Hainaut было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, 53. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Maria van Peteghem. Он умер после 22 январь 1220 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri de Hainaut, Seigneur de Sébourg nació en 1169, en Bélgica, su papá, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, tenía 53 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Maria van Peteghem. Murió después de 22 de enero de 1220.
